\tzpentry{ID4831}{Text Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4831 introduces Text Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{\\mathcal{H}}_{\\text{ER}} = \\int_{\\Sigma} \\sqrt{|g|} R^{\\mu\\nu} T_{\\mu\\nu} d^4x \\equiv \\sum_{k=1}^{N_{\\text{nodes}}} \\text{Res}_{z \\to TZP} [ \\mathcal{Z}_{k} ]$$
